name: dealership-group
description: Automotive market intelligence for multi-location dealer groups. 14 skills, 6 agents, 9 commands. Everything a single dealer gets PLUS group dashboard, cross-location inventory balancing, rooftop benchmarking, dealer group health monitoring, dealer performance intelligence (cohort benchmarking vs 400+ groups), and group rollup briefings. Multi-agent architecture with parallel location scanning. US + UK market support.
